mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, title, status, progress, due_date, created_at, updated_at FROM task ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, template_id, title, status, progress, due_date, created_at, updated_at FROM task WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, template_id, title, status, progress, due_date, created_at, updated_at FROM task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (template_id, title, status, progress, due_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{dueDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET template_id = #{templateId}, title = #{title}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, due_date = #{dueDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
